recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! The Sword and the Scoob
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: An evil sorceress transports the gang back to the age of chivalrous knights, spell-casting wizards, and fire-breathing dragons.
recommendations.director: Maxwell Atoms, Christina Sotta, Melchior Zwyer

recommendations.title: Finnick

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: The Magician's Elephant

recommendations.title: Presto
recommendations.overview: Dignity. Poise. Mystery. We expect nothing less from the great turn-of-the-century magician, Presto. But when Presto neglects to feed his rabbit one too many times, the magician finds he isn't the only one with a few tricks up his sleeve!

recommendations.title: Rugrats Go Wild
recommendations.overview: When the Rugrats find themselves stranded on a deserted island, they meet the Thornberrys, a family who agrees to help them escape.

recommendations.title: Mirai
recommendations.overview: Unhappy after his new baby sister displaces him, four-year-old Kun begins meeting people and pets from his family's history in their unique house in order to help him become the big brother he was meant to be.

recommendations.title: The Bears' Famous Invasion of Sicily

recommendations.title: Mary Poppins
recommendations.overview: In turn of the century London, a magical nanny employs music and adventure to help two neglected children become closer to their father.
